rules.rule: Foundation services must serve only one entity type.
Foundation services must perform structural and logical validation on all incoming models.
Foundation services must call only one broker per operation — never another service.
Foundation services must be a pass-through to the broker — no transformation or enrichment.
Foundation services must map broker exceptions to local exceptions using dependency validation wrappers.
Foundation services must wrap all broker calls in try-catch blocks.
Foundation services must be partial classes split by operation category.
Foundation service interfaces must follow the naming pattern I{Entity}Service.
